events.desc: Wood-fired artisan pizzas made fresh to order. The perfect pairing for a cold pint.
events.title: Stoked Pizza — Food Truck

events.desc: We couldn't think of a better way to kick off our 2.0 launch than with live bluegrass and folk music. Granny Takes a Trip is hitting the stage as a newly minted trio to bring you old-school tunes and great vibes. Come grab a fresh beer and let the boys take you on a whole new trip!
events.title: Patio Sessions: Granny Takes a Trip

events.desc: Loaded nachos and bold Mexican flavours. Hard to stop at one round.
events.title: Costa Nachos — Food Truck

events.desc: Fresh hibachi and Japanese favourites, cooked right outside on the patio.
events.title: Sakura Hibachi — Food Truck

events.desc: Wood-fired artisan pizzas made fresh to order. The perfect pairing for a cold pint.
events.title: Stoked Pizza — Food Truck

events.desc: An evening of soulful tunes and captivating rhythms. Richie Young hits the deck — Stoked Pizza on site beforehand.
events.title: Live on the Deck: Richie Young

events.desc: Swap tips, taste experiments, and talk all things beer. An informal hangout for homebrewing enthusiasts.
events.title: Homebrew Hangouts

events.desc: $1.00 off all drinks for school staff — a thank-you from us for another year done.
events.title: School Staff Social

events.desc: Cape Breton performer Aaron MacDonald takes the deck to help celebrate the end of the school year.
events.title: Live on the Deck: Aaron MacDonald

events.desc: Music from the 1970s and 1980s — it's ABBA meets Punk Rock. Guess the song, shout the answer, win the round.
events.title: Music Bingo: 70s & 80s Night

events.desc: Salt and Sage Tarot is in the taproom for an evening of readings. $20 for a 15-minute session — book your spot on arrival.
events.title: Tarot Readings with Salt & Sage

events.desc: Welcome all 2SLGBTQIA+ community members, allies, families, and friends. $1.00 off drinks during the event.
events.title: Allies & Ales

events.desc: Teams accumulate points for quarterly gift certificates. Solo play welcome — grab a beer and give it a go.
events.title: Tuesday Trivia Night

events.desc: All ages, all musical abilities welcome. Everyone gets to play — bring your instrument, your voice, or just your ears.
events.title: Hampton Open Mic Night

events.desc: $1 off every beer when you bring your pup. Water and treats provided. Always a pet-friendly space.
events.title: Deck Dogs Saturdays

events.desc: $1 Caesars, $1 off beer, $1 off any drink. The best reason to stay for one more.
events.title: Beer & Caesar Sundays

events.desc: Delicious artisan pizza made on site every Friday. You will not regret getting one.
events.title: Stoked Pizza Fridays
